headline: Thermo Fisher Deepens Oncology Role With Ibtrozi Manufacturing Milestone
summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (NYSE:TMO) has completed technology transfer and product introduction for Ibtrozi, a treatment for ROS1-positive non-small cell lung cancer. This marks a key milestone in its collaboration with Nuvation Bio and reflects a deeper role in biopharma manufacturing and oncology drug commercialization. For investors watching NYSE:TMO, this update highlights the company’s position as a partner for complex drug production in cancer care, not just a supplier of equipment and...
